feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: From Cancer to AI Alignment: Tackling Externalities Through Homeostatic Principles
entry.content:
Authors: B Lyons, L Pio-Lopez, M Levin

Journal: 2026

Abstract: The problem of aligning humans and artificial intelligences can be understood in terms of minimizing externalities between them. However, economics cannot define externality because it contradicts the rationality assumption. This paper applies the ...

Alert: Michael Levin (author alert)

entry.title: Pathogen diversity emerging from coevolutionary dynamics in interconnected systems
entry.content:
Authors: D Zanchetta, V Bettio, S Azaele, M De Domenico - arXiv preprint arXiv:2603.29398, 2026

Abstract: The spread of infectious disease and the evolution of antigenically distinct strains are often modeled separately, despite strong feedbacks mediated by host immune memory and heterogeneous contacts. To tackle this challenging problem, we ...

Alert: Manlio De Domenico (author alert)

entry.title: Conserved sleep disturbances in FOXP1 syndrome originate from developmental dysregulation of peptidergic signaling
entry.content:
Authors: M Coll-Tané, I Eidhof, J Han, N Raun, LV van Renssen... - The Journal of Clinical ..., 2026

Abstract: Sleep disturbances are among the most prevalent clinical features of FOXP1 syndrome, yet their nature and underlying mechanisms remain unclear. Here, we report that individuals with FOXP1 syndrome suffer from insomnia with sleep ...

Alert: Simon E. Fisher (author alert)

entry.title: Positive tipping points for nature
entry.content:
Authors: T Lenton

Journal: 2026

Abstract: A radical acceleration of change is needed to reach widely agreed nature positive goals for 2030 and beyond. Triggering positive tipping points where strong amplifying feedback supports selfpropelling nature positive change, can help ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: Timothy Lenton (author alert)

entry.title: Choroid Plexus Enlargement in Post-COVID-19 Syndrome Is Linked to Serum-Induced Cytokine Secretion in Human Hippocampal Progenitors
entry.content:
Authors: D Martins, N Mariani, J Schubert, B Eiff, S Rota...

Journal: 2026

Abstract: Background: Post-COVID-19 syndrome (PCS) is characterised by persistent cognitive, affective, and somatic symptoms that extend months beyond acute SARS- CoV-2 infection, frequently in the absence of overt systemic inflammation. While ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Language, Numeracy, and Musicality

Alert: Federico Turkheimer (author alert)
